feedback.text: It is imperative consumers are protected against predatory business practices from Games Publishers/Developers, the "Stop killing games" initiative is a important first step in the right direction. Though there many other problems that need tackling such as, loot boxes that prey on vulnerable people (eg. Gambling addicts). Stop killing games will prevent Publishers/Developers from unrightfully taking back what you have fairly purchased from them, and dispite what their lobbies will claim (without evidence) when properly implemented, it will not be a significant financial burden for them either.
